item: Review context, scope, interested parties, and documented issues that affect the ISMS.
Review information security objectives and performance measurements.
Review policy set, document register, and document change control status.
Review risk assessment methodology.
Review risk register, treatment plan, and accepted residual risks.
Review Statement of Applicability and confirm control applicability changes.
Review training completion and awareness effectiveness.
Review screening, confidentiality, and offboarding evidence.
Review user access and privileged access.
Review asset inventory and ownership.
Review critical supplier assurance and service changes.
Review external service and cloud shared responsibility assumptions.
Review physical access permissions and visitor authorization records for facilities.
Review vulnerability management metrics and outstanding exceptions.
Review device protection coverage and hardening compliance status.
Review logging, monitoring, and alert handling effectiveness.
Review backup job success and failures.
Perform restore testing for critical systems.
Exercise business continuity and disaster recovery plans.
Review secure development standard, code access, and environment segregation.
Review change management effectiveness and emergency changes.
Review incidents, lessons learned, and corrective action status.
Perform internal audit activities and review finding closure status.
Conduct management review of ISMS performance and improvement actions.
Perform external audit activities and review finding closure status.
